reviews.comment:
Muy buena gente. Hace años cargo nafta ahí, siempre la misma gente, muy amables

(Translated by Google)
Very nice people. I've been getting gas there for years, always the same people, very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d1AzZElBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mala actitud hacia el socio y cliente. Estacioné media hora antes de cargar ya que tenía que resolver un asunto de dinero, cuando volví la seguridad se me acercó indicándome que no se podía estacionar sin avisar y me habían dejado un papel escrito a mano en el parabrisas con la leyenda "15:00 - $100 la hora" como si fuese un estacionamiento privado. YPF - ACA No deberían atacar a los clientes prejuzgando.

(Translated by Google)
Poor attitude towards members and customers. I parked half an hour before refueling because I had to take care of some money. When I returned, security approached me and told me I couldn't park without prior notice. They had also left a handwritten note on my windshield that said "3:00 PM - $100 per hour," as if it were a private parking lot. YPF - ACA shouldn't be attacking customers by making preconceived judgments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdzVhSzJ3RRAB

reviewer.displayName: Ricardo C. Larrondo CC RNFS División Kilo

reviews.comment:
El ACA es el amigo con el que siempre podés confiar, y el camino el ángel amarillo que viene en tu auxilio. El mejor precio de seguro para el socio.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is the friend you can always rely on, and the road is the yellow angel that comes to your aid. The best insurance price for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTN3VET1BBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los chicos son buena onda, lástima que la pregunta que queda es: será que en algún momento la van a modernizar? El shop está cerrado y es muy chico

(Translated by Google)
The guys are cool, it's a shame the question remains: will they ever modernize it? The shop is closed and it's very small.

reviews.comment:
Es una vergüenza esta estación, no tiene ni baños habilitados,no tienen estacionamiento para socios,si querés estacionar te cobran 100 la hora

(Translated by Google)
This station is a disgrace, it doesn't even have bathrooms, they don't have parking for members, if you want to park they charge you 100 an hour
